rice.split_application: Apply 50% N + full P + full K as basal, 25% N at tillering, 25% N at panicle initiation.

deficiency_corrections.iron: Foliar spray 0.5% FeSO4 at 15 and 30 DAT.

wheat.split_application: Apply full P and K + 50% N basal, then 25% N at CRI and 25% N at flowering.

deficiency_corrections.sulfur: Use SSP or elemental sulfur equivalent to 20 kg S/ha.

cotton.split_application: Apply full P and K with one-third N at sowing; remaining N in two equal splits at square and boll development.

deficiency_corrections.boron: Spray 0.2% boric acid at squaring and boll development.

maize.split_application: Apply full P and K plus one-third N at sowing, one-third at knee-high, one-third at tasseling.

deficiency_corrections.sulfur: Use SSP as P source where sulfur is deficient.

groundnut.split_application: Apply full NPK as basal at sowing.

deficiency_corrections.boron: Spray 0.2% borax at pegging and pod fill.

sugarcane.split_application: Apply full P and K at planting; split N at planting, 45 days, and 90 days.

soybean.split_application: Apply full dose as basal with Rhizobium seed treatment.

potato.split_application: Apply full P and K + half N at planting; remaining N at earthing up.

deficiency_corrections.boron: Apply borax 10 kg/ha or equivalent foliar dose.
deficiency_corrections.zinc: Apply ZnSO4 25 kg/ha in deficient soils.

mustard.split_application: Basal full P and K with half N; topdress half N at first irrigation.

deficiency_corrections.sulfur: Apply 20-30 kg S/ha for oilseed response.
deficiency_corrections.boron: Apply 1-2 kg B/ha in boron-deficient zones.

onion.split_application: Apply full P and K + one-third N basal, remaining N in two splits at 30 and 45 DAP.

deficiency_corrections.sulfur: Use sulfur source to improve bulb quality.

tur_dal.split_application: Apply full dose basal with Rhizobium and PSB inoculation.

deficiency_corrections.boron: Foliar boron spray at pre-flowering where needed.

bengal_gram.split_application: Apply full basal dose at sowing with seed inoculation.

deficiency_corrections.zinc: Apply ZnSO4 25 kg/ha in deficient soils.
